name: optimus
description: Marketplace de skills para Droid e Claude Code

plugins.name: task-executor
plugins.description: End-to-end task execution with phased verification gates, interactive code review, and commit approval

plugins.name: post-task-validator
plugins.description: Validates completed tasks against spec, coding standards, and best practices using parallel specialist agents

plugins.name: pre-task-validator
plugins.description: Validates task specifications against project docs before implementation. Catches gaps, contradictions, and test coverage holes.

plugins.name: deep-doc-review
plugins.description: Deep review of project documentation. Finds errors, inconsistencies, gaps, and improvements with interactive resolution.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Parallel code review with consolidation, deduplication, and interactive finding-by-finding resolution.

plugins.name: coderabbit-review
plugins.description: CodeRabbit-driven code review with TDD fix cycle and secondary agent validation.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Two-phase code verification for Go projects: parallel static analysis + sequential tests with MERGE_READY/NEEDS_FIX verdict.
